headline: MCO Stock: Collect 9.4% Now, In Exchange For 11% Of Upside
summary: Here is a way to get paid a meaningful income now on your Moody's shares, cash you keep no matter what, in exchange for agreeing to sell at a price above today's if the stock gets there.
